extracted.title: Nexus Pipeline Conditions for 4/21/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day April 21, 2026, Nexus Gas Transmission, LLC (NEXUS) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to NEXUS's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding NEXUS's operational capacity:

Restricted Locations:
- Hanoverton (Notes: Due to Nexus Posted Outage)
- Meter N2001 Receipts (Notes: Due to Nexus Posted Outage)
- All Vector Meters Downstream of Milford Junction N4MJ1 (Notes: Due to DTE Posted Outage)
- Belle River (Notes: Due to DTE Posted Outage)
- Ypsilanti (Notes: Due to DTE Posted Outage)

Customer Specific OFO: No DP - effective 4/17/26. 4% / 500 Dth Tolerance

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
affectedLocations: All Vector Meters Downstream of Milford Junction N4MJ1
